paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.03, with a 1.6 percent change from the prior close and a -30.43 percent change over a window of 21 sessions. There have been 3 new news articles in the last 24 hours.

Recent news headlines include discussions of the company's governance concerns and a $375 million convertibles deal, with one article questioning whether the bull case for the stock has changed. Another article suggests that the stock may be above fair value after a note offering. The news also mentions the resignation of director designee Miles Everson, who cited governance concerns.

There have been various SEC filings recently, including an 8-K form announcing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031, and another 8-K form disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson. There has also been one Form 4 filing, and 19 proxy solicitation filings. Social media posts about the stock include comments on adding to positions and rebuilding.
